# 🐞 Bug Fix Pull Request

## 📖 Description
Describe the bug and how this PR fixes it.  

## 🔄 Changes
- Fixed ...
- Corrected ...
- Removed ...

## 🖼️ Screenshots / Proof (if applicable)
_Add before/after screenshots, logs, or test results to show the bug is fixed._

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Code follows conventions
- [ ] Unit/Integration tests cover the fix
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)

## 🔗 Related Issues
Fixes #ISSUE_ID
